raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ka tee weenu ta Praweeta Jeremijus
Gekktbu darrija eekſch Iſraëta/
sim laſſijs.
un to Laulibu pahrlausija ar fa-
two Tuwafu Seewahn/un run-
naja Mellu Wahrds eekſch
mannu Wahrdā/ ko es teem ne
biju pawehlejs/un es etmu tag/
kas to finna/ un weens Leezi-
neeks/fakka tas KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un prett Semaju to Ne-
katamiteri runna/ un fakki?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta runna tas KUNGS
Zebaot/ tas Iſraëta Deews/ un
fakka : Tadeht ka tu effi Grah-
matas fuhtijs tawa Wahrdā us
wiﬀeem Laudim/ kas Jerufale-
mē irr/ un uhs Zewaniju Maſe-
jus Dehlu/ to Preesteri/ un uhs
wiﬀeem Preestereem/ un faZZijs:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS effu te-
wi par Preesteri lizzis ta Bree-
ſteru Jojadus Weetā/ ka jums
buhs usranggeim buht eekſch ta
KUNGA Namma pahr ikkatru
Wihrn/ kastrakko/un fewi par
Praweetu turrahs/ ka tew to
Zeetumā un Seekstā buhs liſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad/ kapehz ne effi tu
Jeremija to Anatotiteri aprah-
jis/ kas juhsu Starpā par Pra-
weetu turrahs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tapehz irr wiꞥſch pee
mums us Babeli fuhtijs/ un
faZZijs : Tas buhs ilgam/ ustai-
fajt Nammus / un dfihwojeet
(eekſch teem/) un dehstajt
Dahrsus/ un ehdeet winnu Aug-
tus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Zewanijus tas Bree-
bij fcho Grahmatu preefſch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz notifke ta Ri
GA Wahrdā us Jeremiju/
faZZija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Suhti jelle uhs wiff
Atswesteemi/ un fakki: Ta fo
tas KUNGS prett Semaju
Nekalamiteri : Tapehz ka C
majus jums irr fluddinajs /
es to ne efmu fuhtijs/ un irr d
rijs/ ka juhs uhs Melleein
laischatees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz taſka tas KUN
ta: Rangi/ Es peenekeſchu C
maju to Nekalamiteri/ un w
na Dsiminunu/ wiſnam ne p
derrehs neuweens/ kas fcho La
schu Widdu dfihwohs/ un ne
dsehs to Labbumu/ ko es ma
neem Laudim darriſchn/ fak
tas KUNGS: Jo tas irr we
nu Atkahpfchanu mahzijs pre
to KUNGU-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XXX. Nodalla.
Weena frahiſchna Prezgas Glubbinaſchana/
Deews to Zeetumu sawo Kauschu atkaſ n
wehrsihs: 1/3. Un tohs is leelahm Be-
dahm atpestihs: 5. Winns Pilſſahtu u
Derwa Nammu uſtafihs: 18. Un winn
Eenaidneekus nopobstihs: 16/13.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "S Chis irr tas Wahrdā,
Skas notifke uhs Jeremi-
ju no ta KUNGA/ ka
fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta runna tas KUNGS/
tas Iſraëta Deews/ un fakka:
Rakſti few wiſſis fchohs Wahrdā-
dus/ ko es uhs tevi runnajs ef-
weenā Grahmatā.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
